'''IM4-099''', nicknamed '''"Face"''', was a [[Mark IV sentry droid/Legends|Mark IV sentry droid]] assigned to the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] Militia. Working for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], IM4-099 gave the Imperials information about criminal activity. The droid took its job seriously.

IM4-099 often taunted the [[ASP-series labor droid/Legends|ASP-series droid]] [[ASP-704]], and when it detected illegal signals coming from comm repeaters the ASP was installing, IM4-099 was swatted out of the air by the fed-up droid. IM4-099 recovered from the attack though, and later on was once more seen chirping merrily while accompanying [[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|sandtroopers]].

==Behind the scenes==
IM4-099 was added to the [[1997]] [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|release]] of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] as an entirely [[Wikipedia:3D computer graphics|computer-generated 3D model]].
